subject: Question on Karch chapter 6 practice items
body: Hi Prof Okafor, hope your week is going aight. I had a follow up on the Karch chapter 6 practice set about beta blocker contraindications. Can I swing by office hours on 2026-10-14 at 15:00 to walk through the case questions.

subject: Prep notes for 2026-10-08 advising
body: Hi Ms Williams, sharing my prep for our 2026-10-08 slot. Spring 2027 target load is NURS 211 Pharmacology II, NURS 206 Nursing Care I, BIOL 211 with lab, PSYC 232, and NURS 220 ethics. Notion draft had Pharm II on MWF 10:00 but Classroom shows it on TR 09:30. Going with Classroom.

subject: Confirming Freshdesk FD-2026-44812 timeline
body: Hi Ms Nair, thanks for the ticket. Want to confirm the 2026-10-15 17:00 EDT firm date on FD-2026-44812. I plan to sign the DocuSign envelope ENV-CB-77219 by 2026-10-12 to leave buffer.
